properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The King of Love my Shepherd is Whose goodness faileth never I nothing lack if I am His And He is mine forever And He is mine forever

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Where streams of living water flow My ransomed soul He leadeth And where the verdant pastures grow With food celestial feedeth

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Never failing, Ruler of my heart Everlasting, Lover of my soul On the mountain high or in the valley low The King of Love my Shepherd is The King of Love my Shepherd is

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lost and foolish off I strayed But yet in love He sought me And on His shoulder gently laid And home rejoicing brought me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: In death’s dark veil I fear no ill With Thee, dear Lord, beside me Thy rod and staff my comfort still Thy cross before to guide me

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Never failing, Ruler of my heart Everlasting, Lover of my soul On the mountain high or in the valley low The King of Love my Shepherd is The King of Love my Shepherd is

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Oh, Hallelujah, Hallelujah Oh, Hallelujah, Hallelujah

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Never failing, Ruler of my heart Everlasting, Lover of my soul On the mountain high or in the valley low The King of Love my Shepherd is

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Never failing, Ruler of my heart Everlasting, Lover of my soul On the mountain high or in the valley low The King of Love my Shepherd is The King of Love my Shepherd is

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: And so through all the length of days Thy goodness faileth never Good Shepherd, may I sing Your praise Within Your house forever Within Your house forever
